items.docs: Retrieves the Workspaces (teams) that the authenticated user has access to. Returns Workspace details including name, color, avatar, and a list of members with their roles and permissions.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

items.docs: Retrieves the seat allocation information for a Workspace, including the total number of seats, filled seats, and empty seats.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

items.docs: Retrieves the members of a Workspace, including their roles and permissions. Only available to Workspace owners and admins.
